description: 20 skills les plus populaires pour la creation d'un outil d'audit

skills.name: Security Vulnerability Assessment
skills.description: Detection des failles de securite (XSS, CSRF, SQL Injection, OWASP Top 10)

skills.name: Performance Profiling
skills.description: Analyse des temps de chargement, Core Web Vitals (LCP, FID, CLS)

skills.name: SEO Analysis
skills.description: Audit des balises meta, structure HTML, sitemap, robots.txt

skills.name: Accessibility Compliance (WCAG)
skills.description: Verification des standards WCAG 2.1/2.2, ARIA, contraste des couleurs

skills.name: Code Quality & Static Analysis
skills.description: Analyse statique, complexite cyclomatique, duplication de code, dette technique

skills.name: Dependency & Package Audit
skills.description: Scan des dependances vulnerables, licences, packages obsoletes

skills.name: API Security Testing
skills.description: Test des endpoints API, authentification, autorisation, rate limiting

skills.name: Infrastructure & Cloud Security
skills.description: Audit des configurations cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure), IAM, S3 policies

skills.name: SSL/TLS Certificate Analysis
skills.description: Verification des certificats SSL, protocoles TLS, chiffrement, expiration

skills.name: Mobile Responsiveness
skills.description: Test des interfaces sur differents appareils et resolutions

skills.name: Database Performance & Security
skills.description: Analyse des requetes SQL lentes, indexation, permissions, injection SQL

skills.name: Log Analysis & Monitoring
skills.description: Analyse des logs d'erreurs, patterns suspects, alertes

skills.name: GDPR / Data Privacy Compliance
skills.description: Audit de conformite RGPD, gestion des consentements, data mapping

skills.name: Cross-Browser Compatibility
skills.description: Test sur differents navigateurs (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)

skills.name: Automated Testing Coverage
skills.description: Evaluation de la couverture de tests unitaires, integration, e2e

skills.name: Content Security Policy (CSP)
skills.description: Audit des headers HTTP, CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, CORS

skills.name: Docker & Container Security
skills.description: Scan des images Docker, configurations, secrets exposes, CVE

skills.name: CI/CD Pipeline Audit
skills.description: Analyse des pipelines de deploiement, secrets dans le code

skills.name: Network & Port Scanning
skills.description: Scan des ports ouverts, services exposes, topologie reseau

skills.name: UX / Usability Heuristics
skills.description: Evaluation heuristique selon Nielsen, parcours utilisateur, formulaires
